title: German Apple Pudding Dessert
description: A decadent gluten-free dessert combining traditional German flavors with a creamy apple pudding.
instructions: Peel and chop the apples, then mix with cinnamon, nutmeg, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, mix the pudding and heavy cream.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, mix the apple mixture and pudding mixture.
Dot the top with butter and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 35 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes.
Let the pudding cool before serving.
